# DATPAQ Sample Data API Sample (Detailed)

## Purpose
This app demonstrates how to generate realistic test data from the DATPAQ Sample Data API with a clean frontend request/response workflow.

## API endpoint
- Base URL: `https://datpaq.com/api`
- Route: `GET /v1/sample-data`
- Human docs: `https://www.datpaq.com/docs/sample-data`

## Authentication
The backend requires an API key on each request:
- Header: `x-api-key: <your_api_key>`

## Request parameters
- `type` (required): dataset schema name (example: `company`, `user`, `transaction`).
- `count` (optional): number of rows to generate, range `1-10000`.
- `fields` (optional): comma-separated subset of fields to include.
- `format` (optional): `json` (default) or `csv`.

## Response behavior
- JSON responses generally include:
  - `success`
  - `data` (array)
  - `metadata` (type/count/format/generatedAt)
  - `correlationId`
- CSV responses may return:
  - raw CSV text body and/or
  - `csvData` when wrapped in JSON

## UX behavior in this sample
- Validates required values before requesting.
- Uses GET query parameters.
- Includes loading, error, empty, and success states.
- Provides copyable request URL and full response payload.

## Machine-readable docs
- OpenAI-oriented JSON: `/openai.json`
